title: Mapping object space dimensions: new insights from temporal dynamics
description: This dataset contains raw EEG recordings from a study investigating the neural representation of object space dimensions through temporal dynamics analysis. Participants performed a visual task while neural activity was recorded, with concurrent behavioral data documenting stimulus presentation and trial structure. The dataset includes raw neural signals and event-related information organized in BIDS format.
methods_description: Data were collected during EEG sessions using BDF format recordings. Trial-by-trial behavioral data documenting stimulus presentation and task events were collected concurrently. Channel information and sampling rates are provided for all trials.
